root.sql: select sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) as mem_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group(sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) as member_group_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no as coll_mem_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as coll_mem_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date) as coll_approve_date ,sc_lon_m_contract_coll.remark from sc_lon_m_contract_coll ,sc_lon_m_loan_card ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '12' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date ,sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no
